global.description: The ad features a vibrant teal background with product displays and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting limited stock products at a special price.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A solid teal background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: LuxShelf logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'LuxShelf' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top left of the ad.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: Three rectangular shapes resembling shelves are displayed in the center, suggesting a product showcase.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: Another rectangular shape resembling a shelf is shown next to the first, enhancing the product display.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A third rectangular shape resembling a shelf is positioned next to the others, completing the product showcase.

elements.label: Limited stock message
elements.description: The text 'Limited stock Shop bestsellers now' is prominently displayed in a large, clear font in the center.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A bright button at the bottom features the text '€29.99 Install now' in a bold font, encouraging action.

elements.label: LuxShelf branding
elements.description: The text 'LuxShelf' appears at the top left in a stylish font, reinforcing brand identity.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the text 'SALE' is positioned at the top right, drawing attention to a discount.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the product displays are centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
